title: zanonia indica subsp. indica
intro: Zanonia indica subsp. indica, also known as the Calabash Tree or Wild Bitter Gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Zanonia indica subsp. indica include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-diabetic properties, which contribute to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and lower blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
